query: SELECT ep.eventId, ep.status, ep.selfReportedAt, e.title FROM event_participation ep JOIN events e ON e.id = ep.eventId JOIN alunos a ON a.id = ep.alunoId WHERE a.name LIKE '%Bruno Martins%' ORDER BY e.eventDate;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2kPX7CjhqdMFT8y.9c22f9f54902 --database 5n7arrGNHjNdoFCMzyGXcY --execute SELECT ep.eventId, ep.status, ep.selfReportedAt, e.title FROM event_participation ep JOIN events e ON e.id = ep.eventId JOIN alunos a ON a.id = ep.alunoId WHERE a.name LIKE '%Bruno Martins%' ORDER BY e.eventDate;
